sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
total_green = 0
for node in seg['nodes']:
    if node['color'] == 'N':
        total_green += node['pixels']
    elif node['color'] == 'W' and node['pixels'] > 100:
        b = node['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"Character (W): rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}, {node['pixels']}px")

print(f"Total green pixels: {total_green}")

# Check top bar
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
white_count = sum(1 for c in ascii_lines[0] if c == 'W')
print(f"Top bar white pixels: {white_count}")

# List all green nodes
for node in seg['nodes']:
    if node['color'] == 'N':
        b = node['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"Node {node['id']} (N): rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}, {node['pixels']}px")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
